title: mentha × verticillata var. prachinensis
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. prachinensis, also known as Thai mint, is a type of mint plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat digestive issues, headaches, and skin problems. The health benefits of Thai mint include relief from nausea and indigestion, improved respiratory health, and a reduction in stress and anxiety levels. Thai mint can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, essential oils, and topical creams, making it a versatile and widely used herb in traditional medicine.
